title: selaginella guihaia
intro: Selaginella guihaia, also known as Guihaia, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the Guihaia plant has been used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Guihaia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Guihaia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption in traditional Chinese medicine.
